About Me

Results-driven,
people-first professional

I'm a multidisciplinary professional with a strong foundation in operations coordination, client engagement, and cross-functional team support. My career spans healthcare coordination, senior living management, property oversight, educational support, and executive administration.

I thrive in fast-paced environments where I can leverage my organizational strengths, relationship-building skills, and business acumen to improve workflows and deliver measurable outcomes.

"Adept at managing multiple priorities, improving workflow efficiency, and supporting business objectives — from the front lines to the executive suite."
